headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stock to Target This Week and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: Wall Street has set ambitious price targets for the stocks in this article. While this suggests attractive upside potential, it’s important to remain skeptical because analysts face institutional pressures that can sometimes lead to overly optimistic forecasts.

headline: Hormel Foods Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 global branded food company, today announced its quarterly dividend on the common stock, authorized by the Board of Directors at 29.25 cents ($0.2925) a share on May 18, 2026, will be paid August 17, 2026, to stockholders of record at the close of business on July 13, 2026.
